briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings after the collapse of fintech middleware firm Synapse, raising urgent questions about consumer protections in embedded banking.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's deepening interest in financial data and credit services.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A detailed analysis of how open banking frameworks are reshaping payments competition and what that means for incumbents and fintechs alike.

- **[US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c202pgxx89lo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss)** — *BBC Business* — US inflation climbed to its highest level since May 2023 in April, driven by surging energy costs tied to the ongoing Iran war and its disruption to global supply chains.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Nmbr says it's reshaping payroll competition in Canada. Now it wants to go worldwide](https://betakit.com/nmbr-says-its-reshaping-payroll-competition-in-canada-now-it-wants-to-go-worldwide/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian payroll fintech Nmbr is eyeing global expansion after establishing itself as a disruptive force in Canada's payroll market.

- **[BMO to sell truck, trailer financing businesses to U.S. firm in a bid to sharpen its focus](https://financialpost.com/fp-finance/banking/bmo-sell-truck-trailer-businesses-sharpen-its-focus)** — *Financial Post* — Bank of Montreal is offloading its C$14.5 billion truck and trailer financing portfolio to U.S. firm Stonepeak as the bank looks to streamline its lending operations.

- **[Q&A: Vass Bednar on why Canada is at risk of remaining a digital 51st state](https://betakit.com/qa-vass-bednar-on-why-canada-is-at-risk-of-remaining-a-digital-51st-state/)** — *BetaKit* — Policy thinker Vass Bednar warns that Canada's dependence on U.S. digital platforms and tech infrastructure puts its economic sovereignty at serious risk.

- **[Canada's economy dropped 18,000 jobs in April as unemployment rose to 6-month high](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canada-jobs-april-2026-9.7192292?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canada shed 18,000 jobs in April, pushing unemployment to a six-month high and raising concerns about economic headwinds affecting consumer spending and financial services demand.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada flagged the security risks of screen scraping and committed to a timeline for open banking implementation, a regulatory journey still unfolding and highly relevant to the Canadian fintech landscape.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Why IP is a founder's most powerful growth tool](https://betakit.com/why-ip-is-a-founders-most-powerful-growth-tool/)** — *BetaKit* — A timely reminder for Atlantic Canadian fintech founders that protecting intellectual property early can be a key lever for securing investment, scaling, and competing globally.

- **[Ontario government invests $5 million into life sciences and healthtech startups](https://betakit.com/ontario-government-invests-5-million-into-life-sciences-and-healthtech-startups/)** — *BetaKit* — Ontario's targeted government investment in emerging tech startups highlights the kind of ecosystem funding model that Atlantic Canada could look to replicate for its own fintech and tech sectors.

- **['It has been devastating,' U.S. spirits group says about Canadian alcohol boycotts](https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/nova-scotia/american-alcohol-boycotts-bans-canada-trade-war-nslc-nova-scotia-9.7194289?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Nova Scotia's NSLC is featured in this story about the real economic impact of Canada-U.S. trade tensions, underscoring how macroeconomic and geopolitical forces are shaping consumer and business financial behaviour in Atlantic Canada.
